content: Sorine Jurard: You know, I've always admired Dwemer constructs—efficient, precise, and much better conversation than most Nords. They don’t waste time bragging about how many bandits they’ve split open… or how many times they’ve been split open Daegon: Oh, don’t pretend you don’t fantasize about those brass centurions bending you over their steam-powered piston cocks, Sorine. I know Dwemer fetishists better than you know schematics. Sorine Jurard: Maybe if they were still around to

Sorine Jurard: Gods, these cold nights make my joints ache. Should've stayed in Hammerfell where the sands keep you warm—or at least sober enough to invent something useful. You ever tinker with Dwemer tech in this gods-forsaken cold, Daegon? Daegon: Ugh, Dwemer shit bores me.
